textByHash.304e5602e78dc44bab2d9838fb13aa6dcbe7255e: Be warned human. The Wyrms here are under my protection. I will not let you kill them unless you have permission.
textByHash.c5032b82aff2771660853aff8e73e1122d44eb35: Human! To attack these creatures would be a threat to the balance. Only those with permission may fight them!
